annotations.selected_text: Power-on self-testWhen you install and start the software for the first time or restart the computer and the sequencer, power-on self-test is triggered to check the USB peripheral, network cable connection, firmware version, mounted disk folder specification, and algorithm service one by one. The login interface is displayed when the test is successful, and a message that indicates the exceptions is displayed if the test fails. Corresponding solutions can be found in “Chapter 7 Troubleshooting”.2.6.2.2 LoginAfter passing the power-on self-test, the system will automatically redirect to the login interface, where users can enter the username and password to access the main interface of the software. The CycloneMaster control software supports two types of account logins: user mode and administrator mode. User mode has sequencing operation permissions. Administrator mode has sequencing operation, advanced configuration, viewing log details, and system maintenance permissions. It can enable module check and switch the software window display mode.
